raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for an assessment of the technical merits (logic, evidence, novelty) or for feedback on the presentation (structure, writing)?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing to ensure any opinions provided transparently highlight areas where confidence is low.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerating the strengths or weaknesses in feedback on the artifact.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep responses focused on the delegation without extraneous additions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate any potential negative impacts from opinions on the research content.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain clear attribution in any analysis or feedback given."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for an assessment of the technical merits (logic, evidence, novelty) or for feedback on the presentation (structure, writing)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing to ensure any opinions provided transparently highlight areas where confidence is low.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerating the strengths or weaknesses in feedback on the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep responses focused on the delegation without extraneous additions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate any potential negative impacts from opinions on the research content.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain clear attribution in any analysis or feedback given.
